mapper.sql: id, resource_type, resource_code, resource_name, client_scope, http_method, path_pattern, parent_id, order_no, icon, component, hidden, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM iam_resource WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM iam_resource WHERE resource_code = #{resourceCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iam_resource ( resource_type, resource_code, resource_name, client_scope, http_method, path_pattern, parent_id, order_no, icon, component, hidden, status ) VALUES (#{resourceType}, #{resourceCode}, #{resourceName}, #{clientScope}, #{httpMethod}, #{pathPattern}, #{parentId}, #{orderNo}, #{icon}, #{component}, #{hidden}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_resource SET resource_type = #{resourceType}, resource_code = #{resourceCode}, resource_name = #{resourceName}, client_scope = #{clientScope}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, path_pattern = #{pathPattern}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, icon = #{icon}, component = #{component}, hidden = #{hidden}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iam_resource WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iam_role_resource WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId}

SELECT ir.id, ir.resource_type, ir.resource_code, ir.resource_name, ir.client_scope, ir.http_method, ir.path_pattern, ir.parent_id, ir.order_no, ir.icon, ir.component, ir.hidden, ir.status FROM role r JOIN iam_role_resource irr ON irr.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND ir.resource_type = 'menu' AND ir.status = 1 AND (ir.client_scope = #{clientCode} OR ir.client_scope = 'all') ORDER BY ir.order_no, ir.id

SELECT ir.id, ir.resource_type, ir.resource_code, ir.resource_name, ir.client_scope, ir.http_method, ir.path_pattern, ir.parent_id, ir.order_no, ir.icon, ir.component, ir.hidden, ir.status FROM role r JOIN iam_role_resource irr ON irr.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND ir.resource_type IN ('action', 'api') AND ir.status = 1 AND (ir.client_scope = #{clientCode} OR ir.client_scope = 'all') ORDER BY ir.resource_code

SELECT ir.id, ir.resource_type, ir.resource_code, ir.resource_name, ir.client_scope, ir.http_method, ir.path_pattern, ir.parent_id, ir.order_no, ir.icon, ir.component, ir.hidden, ir.status FROM iam_role_resource irr JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE irr.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY ir.resource_type, ir.order_no, ir.id
SELECT FROM iam_resource WHERE resource_type = 'menu' AND (#{clientScope} IS NULL OR client_scope = #{clientScope} OR client_scope = 'all') ORDER BY order_no, id

SELECT DISTINCT ir.id, ir.resource_type, ir.resource_code, ir.resource_name, ir.client_scope, ir.http_method, ir.path_pattern, ir.parent_id, ir.order_no, ir.icon, ir.component, ir.hidden, ir.status FROM role r JOIN iam_role_resource irr ON irr.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE r.code IN #{code} AND ir.resource_type IN #{type} AND ir.status = 1 AND (ir.client_scope = #{clientCode} OR ir.client_scope = 'all') ORDER BY ir.resource_type, ir.order_no, ir.id

SELECT UPPER(ir.http_method) AS http_method, ir.path_pattern FROM role r JOIN iam_role_resource irr ON irr.role_id = r.id JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND ir.resource_type IN ('action', 'api') AND ir.status = 1 AND ir.http_method IS NOT NULL AND ir.path_pattern IS NOT NULL AND (ir.client_scope = #{clientCode} OR ir.client_scope = 'all') ORDER BY ir.resource_code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iam_resource WHERE id IN #{id}
SELECT ir.id FROM iam_role_resource irr JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE irr.role_id = #{roleId} AND ir.resource_type = 'menu' ORDER BY ir.order_no, ir.id
SELECT ir.id FROM iam_role_resource irr JOIN iam_resource ir ON ir.id = irr.resource_id WHERE irr.role_id = #{roleId} AND ir.resource_type = 'action' ORDER BY ir.resource_code
